properties.description: It migrates the Oracle HR schema tables to an Azure SQL database with incremental runs.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
  'SELECT FILE_TABLE_ID, ',
  'RIGHT(SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, 7) AS SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'RIGHT(TGT_SCHEMA_NAME, 9) AS TGT_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'SRC_NAME AS SRC_TBL_NAME, ',
  'TGT_NAME AS TGT_TBL_NAME ',
  'FROM FILE_TABLE_MAPPING ',
  'WHERE PIPLN_NM = ''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''' ',
  'AND ROW_STS_CD = ''A'''
)
@variables('SqlQuery')

@concat(
  'SELECT FILE_TABLE_ID, ',
  'RIGHT(SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, 8) AS SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'RIGHT(TGT_SCHEMA_NAME, 5) AS TGT_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'SRC_NAME AS SRC_FILE_NAME, ',
  'TGT_NAME AS TGT_TBL_NAME ',
  'FROM FILE_TABLE_MAPPING ',
  'WHERE PIPLN_NM = ''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''' ',
  'AND ROW_STS_CD = ''A'''
)

value.value: @concat('File ', item().SRC_FILE_NAME, ' doesn''t exist in the landing')
@concat('File ', item().SRC_FILE_NAME, ' doesn''t exist in the landing')

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
  'SELECT SSDTM_ID, ',
  'SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'SRC_TBL_NAME, ',
  'STG_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'STG_TBL_NAME, ',
  'DIM_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'DIM_TBL_NAME ',
  'FROM DBO.SRC_STG_DIM_TABLE_MAPPING ',
  'WHERE PIPLN_NM = ''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''' ',
  'AND ROW_STS_CD = ''A'' ',
  'AND SRC_TBL_NAME = ''BLOB_CUSTOMER_RAW'''
)
@variables('SqlQuery')

@concat(
  'SELECT SSDTM_ID, ',
  'SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'SRC_TBL_NAME, ',
  'STG_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'STG_TBL_NAME, ',
  'DIM_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'DIM_TBL_NAME ',
  'FROM DBO.SRC_STG_DIM_TABLE_MAPPING ',
  'WHERE PIPLN_NM = ''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''' ',
  'AND ROW_STS_CD = ''A'' ',
  'AND SRC_TBL_NAME = ''BLOB_CUSTOMER_RAW'''
)
@variables('SqlQuery')
